scripts.deploy:mainnet: pnpm run prepare:mainnet && pnpm run codegen && pnpm run build && pnpm exec goldsky subgraph deploy early-repair/mainnet_0.2.0 --path ./
scripts.deploy:calibration: pnpm run prepare:calibration && pnpm run codegen:calibration && pnpm run build:calibration && pnpm exec goldsky subgraph deploy early-repair/calibration_0.2.0 --path ./
